movie.actors: John Stamos, Vanity, Gene Simmons, George Lazenby
movie.plot: A top secret Agent is murdered, so his estranged son, a high school gymnast, teams up with his dad's attractive female partner to stop the psychopathic hermaphroditic gang leader who killed him, and now plans a major terrorist attack.
movie.title: Never Too Young to Die
movie.writer: Steven Paul (story), Stuart Paul (story), Steven Paul (screenplay), Anthony Foutz (screenplay)
